name: Wuhan DDMC Culture & Sports Co.,Ltd.
summary: Wuhan DDMC Culture & Sports Co.,Ltd. operates in the film, television, sports, and cultural industries in China and internationally. It is involved in the production of films, television, and dramas; artist brokerage; cinema management; and film and television marketing, etc. The company was formerly known as Wuhan DDMC Culture Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Wuhan DDMC Culture & Sports Co.,Ltd. in September 2019. Wuhan DDMC Culture & Sports Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Wuhan, China.
